title: Horizon Brings AI Foundation Large Models into the Masses: White-Box Licensing for Core i7 Cheng L3/L4 Mass Production Accelerates
excerpt: The core capabilities of a Chinese autonomous driving company are becoming the intelligent driving brain of a global automotive giant in the Chinese market. Acc
content_html:
The core capabilities of a Chinese autonomous driving company are becoming the intelligent driving brain of a global automotive giant in the Chinese market. According to Gelonghui, on July 22nd, Horizon and the Volkswagen Group officially announced that through their joint venture Coretech (CARIZON), they will further deepen their technical collaboration in the field of AI foundation large models via CARIAD and Horizon. The weight of this cooperation lies in the licensing method: Coretech will rely on Horizon's advanced AI foundation large model capabilities and independently develop and accelerate the construction of a unified AI driving solution for the Volkswagen Group in China based on a white-box licensing model. Delivering the model capabilities in a white-box manner means that Volkswagen is not just purchasing a black-box result, but obtaining a technical foundation that can be self-digested and self-iterated.

Having only the model is not enough; real implementation relies on an entire collaborative system. Horizon's AI foundation large model will closely integrate with Coretech's developing system-on-chip C7H and GAIA world model data platform, forming synergy at the bottom level to comprehensively empower the implementation of L3 and L4-level autonomous driving capabilities for the Volkswagen Group. This combination not only lays the technological foundation for future passenger cars and autonomous taxi (Robotaxi) applications, but also drives continuous iteration and upgrading of the already mass-produced full-scenario advanced driver assistance solutions, allowing today's driver assistance and tomorrow's true autonomous driving to share the same growth path.

The more critical step is that this AI-powered intelligent driving technology system will be deeply integrated with the Volkswagen Group's first regionally developed electronic architecture, known as the CEA architecture. The significance of this integration lies in combining algorithms, chips, and vehicle electronic architecture into one, rather than each managing their own part. Leveraging the group's platform advantages, these technologies can be flexibly adapted to multiple vehicle platforms and deployed on a variety of models, achieving broader application within the Volkswagen product lineup targeting China and some international markets. When the AI foundation large model developed by the Chinese team is integrated into the bloodline of global models through the joint venture, the story of intelligent driving for Volkswagen in China has clearly turned a new page.

sentences.en: The core capabilities of a Chinese autonomous driving company are becoming the intelligent driving brain of a global automotive giant in the Chinese market.
sentences.zh: 中国自动驾驶企业的核心能力，正在成为全球汽车巨头在中国市场的智能驾驶大脑。

sentences.en: According to Gelonghui, on July 22nd, Horizon and the Volkswagen Group officially announced that through their joint venture Coretech (CARIZON), they will further deepen their technical collaboration in the field of AI foundation large models via CARIAD and Horizon.
sentences.zh: 据格隆汇报道，7月22日，地平线与大众集团正式宣布，通过合资公司Coretech（CARIZON），双方将通过CARIAD与地平线进一步深化在AI基础大型车型领域的技术合作。

sentences.en: The weight of this cooperation lies in the licensing method: Coretech will rely on Horizon's advanced AI foundation large model capabilities and independently develop and accelerate the construction of a unified AI driving solution for the Volkswagen Group in China based on a white-box licensing model.
sentences.zh: 此次合作的重磅在于授权方式：芯泰科技将依托地平线先进的AI基础大模型能力，基于白盒授权模式，自主研发并加速建设大众汽车集团在中国统一的AI驾驶解决方案。

sentences.en: Delivering the model capabilities in a white-box manner means that Volkswagen is not just purchasing a black-box result, but obtaining a technical foundation that can be self-digested and self-iterated.
sentences.zh: 以白盒方式交付模型能力，意味着大众购买的不仅仅是黑盒成果，而是获得了可以自我消化、自我迭代的技术基础。

This combination not only lays the technological foundation for future passenger cars and autonomous taxi (Robotaxi) applications, but also drives continuous iteration and upgrading of the already mass-produced full-scenario advanced driver assistance solutions, allowing today's driver assistance and tomorrow's true autonomous driving to share the same growth path.

sentences.en: Having only the model is not enough; real implementation relies on an entire collaborative system.
sentences.zh: 仅拥有模型是不够的；还必须有模型。真正的实施依赖于整个协作系统。

sentences.en: Horizon's AI foundation large model will closely integrate with Coretech's developing system-on-chip C7H and GAIA world model data platform, forming synergy at the bottom level to comprehensively empower the implementation of L3 and L4-level autonomous driving capabilities for the Volkswagen Group.
sentences.zh: 地平线AI基础大模型将与Coretech正在开发的片上系统C7H和GAIA世界模型数据平台紧密结合，形成底层协同，全面赋能大众集团L3、L4级自动驾驶能力的落地。

sentences.en: This combination not only lays the technological foundation for future passenger cars and autonomous taxi (Robotaxi) applications, but also drives continuous iteration and upgrading of the already mass-produced full-scenario advanced driver assistance solutions, allowing today's driver assistance and tomorrow's true autonomous driving to share the same growth path.
sentences.zh: 这一组合不仅为未来乘用车和自动驾驶出租车（Robotaxi）应用奠定了技术基础，也带动了已经量产的全场景高级驾驶辅助解决方案的不断迭代和升级，让今天的辅助驾驶和明天的真正自动驾驶共享同一条增长路径。

blocks.html_en: The more critical step is that this AI-powered intelligent driving technology system will be deeply integrated with the Volkswagen Group's first regionally developed electronic architecture, known as the CEA architecture. The significance of this integration lies in combining algorithms, chips, and vehicle electronic architecture into one, rather than each managing their own part. Leveraging the group's platform advantages, these technologies can be flexibly adapted to multiple vehicle platforms and deployed on a variety of models, achieving broader application within the Volkswagen product lineup targeting China and some international markets. When the AI foundation large model developed by the Chinese team is integrated into the bloodline of global models through the joint venture, the story of intelligent driving for Volkswagen in China has clearly turned a new page.

sentences.en: The more critical step is that this AI-powered intelligent driving technology system will be deeply integrated with the Volkswagen Group's first regionally developed electronic architecture, known as the CEA architecture.
sentences.zh: 更关键的一步是，这套AI驱动的智能驾驶技术系统将与大众集团首个区域化开发的电子架构——CEA架构深度融合。

sentences.en: The significance of this integration lies in combining algorithms, chips, and vehicle electronic architecture into one, rather than each managing their own part.
sentences.zh: 这种整合的意义在于将算法、芯片和车辆电子架构合而为一，而不是各自管理自己的部分。

sentences.en: Leveraging the group's platform advantages, these technologies can be flexibly adapted to multiple vehicle platforms and deployed on a variety of models, achieving broader application within the Volkswagen product lineup targeting China and some international markets.
sentences.zh: 凭借集团的平台优势，这些技术可灵活适配多个车型平台并部署在多种车型上，在大众汽车针对中国及部分国际市场的产品阵容中实现更广泛的应用。

sentences.en: When the AI foundation large model developed by the Chinese team is integrated into the bloodline of global models through the joint venture, the story of intelligent driving for Volkswagen in China has clearly turned a new page.
sentences.zh: 当中国团队研发的AI基础大型车型通过合资融入全球车型的血统时，大众汽车在中国的智能驾驶故事显然已经翻开了新的一页。

content_html_zh:
中国自动驾驶企业的核心能力，正在成为全球汽车巨头在中国市场的智能驾驶大脑。 据格隆汇报道，7月22日，地平线与大众集团正式宣布，通过合资公司Coretech（CARIZON），双方将通过CARIAD与地平线进一步深化在AI基础大型车型领域的技术合作。 此次合作的重磅在于授权方式：芯泰科技将依托地平线先进的AI基础大模型能力，基于白盒授权模式，自主研发并加速建设大众汽车集团在中国统一的AI驾驶解决方案。 以白盒方式交付模型能力，意味着大众购买的不仅仅是黑盒成果，而是获得了可以自我消化、自我迭代的技术基础。

仅拥有模型是不够的；还必须有模型。真正的实施依赖于整个协作系统。 地平线AI基础大模型将与Coretech正在开发的片上系统C7H和GAIA世界模型数据平台紧密结合，形成底层协同，全面赋能大众集团L3、L4级自动驾驶能力的落地。 这一组合不仅为未来乘用车和自动驾驶出租车（Robotaxi）应用奠定了技术基础，也带动了已经量产的全场景高级驾驶辅助解决方案的不断迭代和升级，让今天的辅助驾驶和明天的真正自动驾驶共享同一条增长路径。

更关键的一步是，这套AI驱动的智能驾驶技术系统将与大众集团首个区域化开发的电子架构——CEA架构深度融合。 这种整合的意义在于将算法、芯片和车辆电子架构合而为一，而不是各自管理自己的部分。 凭借集团的平台优势，这些技术可灵活适配多个车型平台并部署在多种车型上，在大众汽车针对中国及部分国际市场的产品阵容中实现更广泛的应用。 当中国团队研发的AI基础大型车型通过合资融入全球车型的血统时，大众汽车在中国的智能驾驶故事显然已经翻开了新的一页。
